_description: MyPhonicsBooks assessment structure — diagnostic level finder, formative/summative checkpoints

diagnostic_assessment.purpose: Determine a child's current phonics level before starting

stages.name: Sound Recognition
stages.description: Show graphemes, child says the sound

sounds_by_level.level_4: No new sounds — test blending ability with clusters

stages.name: Word Reading
stages.description: Show decodable words, child reads them

adaptive_algorithm.start: Level 1, Sound Group 1 (s, a, t, p, i)
rules: 4/5 correct → move to next sound group
2-3/5 correct → test 3 more from same group
Sub-rule: 2/3 correct → move on (borderline, note for review)
Sub-rule: 0-1/3 correct → STOP, this is their ceiling
0-1/5 correct → STOP, this is their ceiling
adaptive_algorithm.after_sounds: Test word reading at the identified level
adaptive_algorithm.result: Your child is at Level X

summative_thresholds.fluency: Reading connected text without excessive sounding out

gamification_principles.character_driven: Friendly alien/robot guide that reacts to answers
gamification_principles.no_failure_states: Every answer progresses — wrong answers just note the gap
gamification_principles.visual_rewards: Stars, badges, animations for correct answers
gamification_principles.adaptive_difficulty: Start easy, get harder only if succeeding
gamification_principles.graceful_stop: End on a success when ceiling is found
